description: Disabling S3 Block Public Access to share an object and exposing the whole bucket.
body: Failure mode: to share one file an engineer turns off Block Public Access or adds Principal:* to the bucket policy, making objects world-readable. Detection signals: s3api get-bucket-policy-status returns IsPublic true, Access Analyzer flags public access, and unexpected GET traffic appears. Do not disable account/bucket Block Public Access for a one-off share. Safer fallback: generate a time-limited presigned URL or use CloudFront with Origin Access Control, keep Block Public Access on, and treat any genuine public-bucket need as a human-gated decision.
